creator: Ohata.Hideshi@dx.MitsubishiElectric.co.jp
text:
samba-libsmbclient with SAMBA_PORT=samba33 can not install.
At leaset, it could be installed 26th June.
Actually, pkg-plist.swat is missing in the ports-dir,but I can't determine
what is wrong.

 env SAMBA_PORT=samba33 make install
===>  Installing for samba-libsmbclient-3.3.6
===>   samba-libsmbclient-3.3.6 depends on shared library: execinfo.1 - found
===>   samba-libsmbclient-3.3.6 depends on shared library: cups.2 - found
===>   samba-libsmbclient-3.3.6 depends on shared library: popt.0 - found
===>   samba-libsmbclient-3.3.6 depends on shared library: ldap-2.3.2 - found
===>   samba-libsmbclient-3.3.6 depends on shared library: iconv.3 - found
cat: /usr/ports/net/samba-libsmbclient/pkg-plist.swat: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

config options are shown as follow;
/var/db/ports/samba33-libsmbclient/options
# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# No user-servicable parts inside!
# Options for samba-libsmbclient-3.3.6
_OPTIONS_READ=samba-libsmbclient-3.3.6
WITH_LDAP=true
WITH_ADS=true
WITH_CUPS=true
WITH_WINBIND=true
WITH_SWAT=true
WITHOUT_ACL_SUPPORT=true
WITHOUT_AIO_SUPPORT=true
WITHOUT_FAM_SUPPORT=true
WITH_SYSLOG=true
WITHOUT_QUOTAS=true
WITHOUT_UTMP=true
WITHOUT_PAM_SMBPASS=true
WITHOUT_DNSUPDATE=true
WITHOUT_DNSSD=true
WITHOUT_EXP_MODULES=true
WITH_POPT=true
WITHOUT_MAX_DEBUG=true
WITHOUT_SMBTORTURE=true

How-To-Repeat: env SAMBA_PORT=samba33 make install
